wanted.name: Commission Factory
wanted.note: APAC's largest network (owned by Awin Group but separate API). Public REST docs at dev.commissionfactory.com.

wanted.name: Webgains
wanted.note: UK-headquartered. Smart Platform API publicly documented on Stoplight (docs.webgains.dev).

wanted.name: FlexOffers
wanted.note: US aggregator. Sales / Reporting / Payments APIs are public (api.flexoffers.com).

wanted.name: Daisycon
wanted.note: NL/BE performance network. OAuth2 since 2023, public docs at developers.daisycon.com.

wanted.name: TradeTracker
wanted.note: Global, NL-headquartered. SOAP-based but functional; affiliate.tradetracker.com/webService.

wanted.name: Adtraction
wanted.note: Nordic network. v2/v3 REST docs public at apidocs.adtraction.net.

wanted.name: Adcell
wanted.note: DACH network (now under mrge holding). API exists for publishers but docs are dashboard-gated — expect reverse-engineering.

wanted.name: ClickBank
wanted.note: Digital products giant. Analytics + Order APIs are public; no dev key required since 2023.

wanted.name: Amazon Creators API
wanted.note: Successor to PA-API (which deprecates 15 May 2026). Docs at affiliate-program.amazon.com/creatorsapi/docs.

wanted.name: TUNE (HasOffers)
wanted.note: Long-running CPA platform. Public REST docs at developers.tune.com.

wanted.name: Admitad
wanted.note: Global network, strong in CEE/EU. OAuth2 reporting API public at developers.admitad.com.

wanted.name: ShopMy
wanted.note: US creator network. OAuth-based creator/brand API, public docs at docs.shopmy.us.

wanted.name: Levanta
wanted.note: Amazon-focused creator platform. /partners /products /reports endpoints public (knowledge.levanta.io/creator-api).

wanted.name: PartnerStack
wanted.note: B2B SaaS partner standard. Separate Vendor + Partner APIs, both publicly documented at docs.partnerstack.com.

wanted.name: Tolt
wanted.note: SaaS-focused affiliate platform. Bearer-auth REST, public docs at docs.tolt.com.

wanted.name: Rewardful
wanted.note: Stripe-native SaaS affiliate tool. Public REST docs at developers.rewardful.com.

wanted.name: Refersion
wanted.note: Shopify-heavy affiliate platform. Full public docs at refersion.dev.

wanted.name: Tapfiliate
wanted.note: Mid-market multi-platform. v1.6 X-Api-Key REST, public docs at tapfiliate.com/docs/rest.

wanted.name: Howl (Narrativ)
wanted.note: Independent creator / journalist link network. API key + REST documented at docs.narrativ.com.

wanted.name: Involve Asia
wanted.note: APAC's growing network. Public REST docs.
